CSS Games

Specificity Calculator
Calculate the specificity of CSS selectors
Flexbox Frogger
Apply the correct flexbox properties to match the layout
Grid Garden
Place the item in the correct grid position
Cascade Order Predictor
Which style rule wins? Predict the final computed value.
Selector Specificity Battle
Which selector has higher specificity? Pick the winner!
Box Model Visualizer
Given the CSS, what are the total dimensions?
Animation Timing Quiz
Match the easing function to the motion curve
Container Query Challenge
Predict which styles apply based on container size
Color Function Mixer
Use modern CSS color functions to match the target
Responsive Breakpoint Builder
Which styles are active at each viewport width?
